comment: Curated scenario handoff moments (task #18). Sources are r-line probe games (policy Mewtwo P1 vs tech_random Fox P2 on FD) copied into scenarios/replays/. Frames are in-game frame numbers (GO ~ frame 0). Curated 2026-07-16 from a scan of 55 probe replays (scripts/scan_scenarios.exs); picks favor early handoff frames (short prefix, less drift risk) and clean situations per docs/guides/SCENARIOS.md.

entries.note: dx=-17.2 p1_facing=1 p1_action=18 (turn); Fox behind at mid range
dx=-8.7 p1_facing=1 p1_action=20 (dash); Fox close behind during dash
dx=-12.4 p1_facing=1 p1_action=42 (landing); Fox behind on landing
entry=missed_bound_u p2_x=-43.8 dist=9.8; point-blank missed tech
entry=missed_bound_u p2_x=12.5 dist=7.2; closest curated chase
p2=(85.6,0.0) p1_x=58.2; Fox at right ledge height, P1 near
p2=(-87.6,35.0) p1_x=-48.0; left side, Fox above ledge
p2=(-85.7,177.0) p1_x=-8.5; high recovery, P1 starts near center

entry=191 p1=(-66.1,0.0); policy knocked down mid-left. Only 4 getup candidates exist in 55 probe games (the dummy never attacks; knockdowns are self-inflicted) and the other three diverge or slide off the edge - single entry until a fixture with an attacking dummy exists
